output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?club ?clubLabel(COUNT(*) AS ?titles) WHERE {
  ?club wdt:P31 wd:Q149224 .
  ?club p:P1373 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P1373 wd:Q26320 .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?club rdfs:label ?clubLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?clubLabel) = "en")
  }
}
GROUP BY ?club ?clubLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?titles)
LIMIT 1
output.formatted:
Real Madrid

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?club ?clubLabel(COUNT(*) AS ?titles) WHERE {
  ?club wdt:P31 wd:Q149224 .
  ?club p:P1373 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P1373 wd:Q26320 .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?club rdfs:label ?clubLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?clubLabel) = "en")
  }
}
GROUP BY ?club ?clubLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?titles)
LIMIT 1
```
